cards.title: SFR Distillery

cards.title: Epicure

cards.title: WesleyNY
cards.notes: Call went well Apr 30. Low priority. No recent movement.

cards.title: Salehe — Core Flows (June 4 Deadline)
cards.notes: All flows must be live by June 2 for June 4 Puma Vellum drop. Welcome Series, Browse Abandon, Cart + Checkout Abandon, Post-Purchase. Marathon (Sammy) as build support — pricing TBD. List cleaning underway (750k via Kickbox).

cards.title: Salehe — Puma Vellum Campaign (June 4)
cards.notes: First campaign: Puma World Cup Vellum drop June 4. Assets from Fardad due June 2. Creative direction: image-heavy flyer style. Simple, clean, high-design.

cards.title: FRNK Boutique — Onboarding + Flows
cards.notes: Kicked off May 22. 9 flows + signup form to build. Everything blocked until Steph delivers brand assets. Victoria to coordinate. Meaghan needs separate FRNK briefing (was absent from kickoff).

cards.title: RVCA Welcome Series
cards.notes: Copy flagged as generic by Meaghan — needs full rewrite before going to Clay. Marl + RV on design. BLOCKED: interest group not set on sign-up form → split won't work until fixed.

cards.title: RVCA × OuterSignal Integration
cards.notes: Needs Enterprise upgrade ($399/mo) + backsearch ($1.3–15k depending on scope). Michael must call Clay re: decision. Hunter waiting. Connect Klaviyo now, push data AFTER backsearch.

cards.title: RVCA Post-MDW Campaigns
cards.notes: MDW complete. Next: Wednesday send TBD + ongoing 2x/week cadence. New Arrivals (Men's, Women's, Gender-Neutral) variants in flight. Clay approval required before send.

cards.title: RVCA Add to Cart Flow
cards.notes: Clay support ticket open. Blocked until resolved.

cards.notes: Roadmap confirmed across 2 calls. Priority: Replenishment (#1), Skin Analyzer (#2), Sample 5-Star Review, Referral, Welcome Series upgrade, 1st-to-2nd Purchase. Builder TBD — clarify ownership with client (James has been doing heavy lifting).

cards.title: Riversol Win-Back Flow
cards.notes: 3-lane: Samplers, One-Hit Wonders, Return Customers. Built and in client review queue. Una to confirm segments before flipping live.

cards.title: Liverpool — Campaign Ownership Proposal
cards.notes: Upgrade proposal has been 'in progress' too long. Must send before Friday May 29 call. Contract ending after May — this is the retention pitch.

cards.title: Liverpool Toki Rewards Migration
cards.notes: Loyalty platform migration in progress. Redemption window reverted to 24hrs (CS issue). Needs clean post-migration Toki flow architecture.

cards.title: Hiba Sign-Up Form + Pop-Up Fix
cards.notes: Calendly not loading — likely website-level issue. ITC/dev unresponsive. Victoria now primary AM. Michael to send Hiba update + pop-up fix report.

cards.title: Brand Featured Welcome Series
